message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 8 goals for the model.
Setting up participants first: one expanded pool for the online retailer with lanes for Portal, Warehouse, and Accounting; and one collapsed pool for the external Customer.
I’ll now model the full return process inside the existing Online Retailer pool (using the Portal/Warehouse/Accounting lanes) and connect the Customer (collapsed pool) via message flows.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 4 issue(s) — details below.
